item.description: Watch a satisfying life hack comparing a snake egg with a steamer basket, highlighting textures and surprising results in an ASMR-style demonstration.

item.title: Cooking the Perfect Egg
item.description: Step-by-step guide to cooking the perfect egg, with tips for texture, timing, and technique to achieve a satisfying and delicious result every time.
